alerts.source: FWGS store pickup inventory API browser-assisted collector
alerts.storeAddress: Paoli Shopping Center, 17 Leopard Road, Paoli, PA, 19301
alerts.inventorySemantics: FWGS browser/CDP collection uses the Oracle Commerce store-location endpoint plus /ccstorex/custom/v1/b2b/get-inventory to collect pickup quantity by SKU and store. Direct server fetch is Akamai/session gated, so scheduled collection needs a browser-assisted session bootstrap.
alerts.reason: New store_level store_inventory_result signal for Old Fitzgerald Bottled-in-Bond Decanter Series in PA.
alerts.evidence: FWGS pickup inventory API reported 10 unit(s) of Old Fitzgerald Straight Bourbon 7 Year Old Bottled in Bond (100050636) at FINE WINE & GOOD SPIRITS 1528 in Paoli. Source route: /ccstorex/custom/v1/b2b/get-inventory with method=pickup, location=1528.
